name: Engine Off
description: Motor cutting out and spinning to stop

prompts.label: motor cutting out and spinning down to complete stop
prompts.text: motor cutting out and spinning down to complete stop, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay

prompts.label: engine killing with descending RPM and final shudder
prompts.text: engine killing with descending RPM and final shudder, Victorian clocktower, ratchet wrench click, oiled-machine rhythm, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, impactful, smooth fade out

prompts.label: industrial machine powering off with decelerating whir
prompts.text: industrial machine powering off with decelerating whir, locomotive engine room, tempered steel spring release, riveted iron solidity, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, sustained resonance

prompts.label: diesel generator winding down with diminishing combustion rhythm
prompts.text: diesel generator winding down with diminishing combustion rhythm, blacksmith anvil yard, cast iron lever thrown, pneumatic power hiss, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, impactful, with natural decay

prompts.label: factory floor going silent as last machine stops
prompts.text: factory floor going silent as last machine stops, submarine pressure hull, copper pipe resonance ping, precision clockwork ticking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, smooth fade out
